10/01/2018
715 GG0130F2_UPR_DRSNG_GOAL_CD GG0130F2_UPR_DRSNG_GOAL_CD GG0130F2 Upper Dressing Goal Indicator CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's goal to dress and undress above the waist; including fasteners, if applicable by the end of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
 01=Dependent
 02=Substantial/maximal assistance
 03=Partial/moderate assistance
 04=Supervision or touching assistance
 05=Setup or clean-up assistance
 06=Independent
 07=Resident refused
 09=Not applicable
